systemKnowledge.vectorizeTooltip: Generate vector embeddings for all knowledge base entries to enable semantic search
systemKnowledge.initializeTooltip: Initialize system knowledge base with core documentation
systemKnowledge.reindexTooltip: Rebuild the search index for all knowledge entries
systemKnowledge.aboutInitialize: Scans installed system packages, reads their documentation, and creates structured knowledge entries. This provides the AI with deep understanding of your system's capabilities.
systemKnowledge.aboutReindex: Rebuilds the search index by re-processing all existing knowledge entries. Use this after bulk imports or if search results seem stale.
systemKnowledge.aboutRefreshManPages: Re-reads all man pages from the system and updates or creates knowledge entries. Useful after installing new packages.
systemKnowledge.aboutPopulateCommands: Discovers available system commands and creates knowledge entries with usage information, flags, and examples.
systemKnowledge.aboutIndexDocs: Indexes documentation files from configured directories (e.g., /usr/share/doc) into the knowledge base.
systemKnowledge.aboutWhenToUse: Run Initialize first on new systems. Use Refresh Man Pages and Populate Commands after installing new software. Reindex if search performance degrades.

threatDashboard.title: Threat Intelligence
threatDashboard.subtitle: URL reputation checking and domain security analysis
threatDashboard.urlReputationDesc: Check any URL against threat intelligence services
threatDashboard.noServicesEnvHint: Set VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY or URLVOID_API_KEY environment variables.
threatDashboard.domainSecurityDesc: Current domain validation settings and lists

threatSettings.title: Threat Intelligence Settings
threatSettings.subtitle: Configure external threat intelligence API integrations
threatSettings.virusTotalDesc: VirusTotal aggregates data from over 70 antivirus scanners and URL/domain blocklisting services. The free API allows 4 requests per minute.
threatSettings.urlVoidDesc: URLVoid checks domains against 30+ blocklist engines and provides domain age, registration info, and reputation data. The free tier allows 10 requests per minute.
threatSettings.cacheDesc: URL reputation results are cached to reduce API calls and improve response times. Cached results are marked with a badge in the dashboard.
threatSettings.domainSecurityDesc: Configure domain validation behavior for URL checking.
threatSettings.dnsVerificationHint: Verify domains resolve to valid IPs
threatSettings.apiKeysInfo: API keys should be configured via environment variables for security. Add the following to your .env file:
threatSettings.restartHint: Restart the backend service after updating environment variables.

accessMetrics.title: Access Control Metrics
accessMetrics.description: Monitor and analyze endpoint access patterns and violations.
accessMetrics.noData: No metrics data available for the selected period.

enforcement.title: Endpoint Overrides
enforcement.noOverridesDesc: Add overrides to customize access control for specific endpoints.
enforcement.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the override for {endpoint}?
enforcement.revertDescription: This will remove the override for {endpoint} and the endpoint will use the global enforcement mode.
enforcement.endpointHint: The API endpoint path (supports path parameters like {id})

modeSelector.title: Enforcement Mode
modeSelector.description: Select how the access control system should handle unauthorized requests.
modeSelector.modeDisabledDesc: Access control validation is turned off. All requests pass through without checking permissions.
modeSelector.modeLogOnlyDesc: Validates requests and logs violations but allows all traffic through. Good for testing.
modeSelector.modeEnforcedDesc: Full access control enforcement. Unauthorized requests are blocked with 403 Forbidden.
modeSelector.warningTitle: Warning: Enabling enforcement may block requests
modeSelector.warningDesc: Review your endpoint overrides and user permissions before switching to enforced mode.
modeSelector.infoTitle: Log-only mode is recommended for initial setup
modeSelector.infoDesc: Monitor violations in the Access Metrics panel before enabling full enforcement.

changeHistory.title: Change History
changeHistory.description: Recent changes to access control configuration.
changeHistory.actionLogOnly: Switched to log-only mode for safe testing

interface.title: Remote Desktop Access
interface.description: Access and control remote desktop environments through a secure VNC connection.
interface.typeTextPlaceholder: Type text to send to desktop...
interface.errorBackendUnavailable: Backend configuration service unavailable. Please ensure the AutoBot backend is running and accessible.
interface.errorNetworkConnectivity: Network connectivity issues. Please check your connection and try again.
interface.errorConfigTimeout: Configuration service timeout. The backend may be under heavy load.
interface.errorConfigFailed: Failed to get desktop configuration. Please check backend logs.
interface.errorServiceTimeout: Desktop service timed out. Please try again.

popoutBrowser.headlessDesc: Browser runs in headless mode on the backend.
popoutBrowser.noSession: No active browser session. Launch a session to start browsing.
popoutBrowser.headlessInstructions: Enter a URL in the address bar above to navigate. Results will be logged below.
popoutBrowser.getStarted: Use automation controls above to get started
popoutBrowser.launchDesc: This will open a live browser that you can control directly
